title: Pungent Smoke Hot Thai Corn Noodles
description: A smoky and savory Thai-inspired noodle dish featuring cornmeal, perfect for a late night craving. This low-calorie friendly recipe combines the flavors of Bangkok street food with a spicy kick.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat and add the smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the thai red curry paste to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl and toss with the coconut milk mixture until the noodles are well coated.
Add the cornmeal to the bowl and toss until the noodles are evenly coated with the cornmeal mixture.
Add the curry paste mixture to the bowl and toss until the noodles are well combined with the curry paste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with sliced scallions and crushed peanuts.
